positive: A stylized celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) silhouette, rendered in a deep sapphire blue and vibrant gold ink wash effect. The fox is depicted in a graceful, dynamic pose, surrounded by a cosmic mandala pattern composed of stylized crescent moons, swirling nebula clouds, and minimalist eight-pointed stars. The style must mimic highly detailed screen-printed linocut art, emphasizing thick, bold outlines and flat, high-contrast color blocking. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, optimized for a circular print placement on apparel. Use negative space dramatically to define the subject's outline. Minimalist, high contrast, highly decorative, occult, fantasy, symmetry.
